_meta.notes: Signed off 2026-06-23, extended 2026-06-24. 80 faithful + 15 adversarial labels. CID mappings verified by HMAC. Evidence-grounded narratives for faithful, graduated adversarials (5 blatant + 10 subtle) for false.

cases.description: Kotlin dev, Chennai co-location — 4 pass gates+skills (Karan, Vivaan, Rahul, Vikram), Aarav excluded avail, Suresh excluded hard-skill

cid:60e7faf052a3012869ddb7d87f9873502ba1.narrative: Karan brings 5 years of Kotlin and Android development experience, with payments domain exposure from a fintech startup.
